verdict: An exceptionally rhythmic and well-flowing hard dance chart with satisfying sixteenth-note gallops, marred only by one locked-hold pattern that forces an awkward single-foot run.

issues.problem: While R is held, the chart introduces a sixteenth-note burst (30.440 U -> 30.565 D -> 30.690 L) forcing the left foot to execute a highly awkward three-direction sequence at sixteenth speed.
